com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.file

Class EnhancedResourcesItemReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.springframework.batch.item.ItemStreamSupport
      • org.springframework.batch.item.support.AbstractItemStreamItemReader<org.springframework.core.io.Resource>
        • org.springframework.batch.item.file.ResourcesItemReader
          • com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.file.EnhancedResourcesItemReader
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.springframework.batch.item.ItemReader<org.springframework.core.io.Resource>, org.springframework.batch.item.ItemStream, org.springframework.batch.item.ItemStreamReader<org.springframework.core.io.Resource>

    public class EnhancedResourcesItemReader
extends org.springframework.batch.item.file.ResourcesItemReader
    Mimics mlcp in terms of what parameters are supported.

      • read

        public org.springframework.core.io.Resource read()
                                          throws java.lang.Exception
        Ask the superclass to read an item, and then if inputFilePattern has been set, verify that the item's filename matches the pattern. If not, make another read.
        Specified by:
        read in interface org.springframework.batch.item.ItemReader<org.springframework.core.io.Resource>
        Overrides:
        read in class org.springframework.batch.item.file.ResourcesItemReader
        Returns:
        Throws:
